description: V100 P1 (Issue #12): Rotating pundit cast with personalities. Each pundit has a name, personality archetype, bias profile, and catchphrases. The commentary engine picks a pundit per match (rotating) and uses their personality to color the commentary.

kickoff: Right, let's see who actually fancies it today.
No hiding places out there — show me what you've got.
I want to see tackles flying in. Get stuck in.
goal: Proper finish that. Took his chance like a man.
About time someone stepped up. Quality.
That's what happens when you get in the box.
miss: That's a shocking miss. Week in, week out.
He'll be having nightmares about that one.
halftime: I've seen enough. Some of them are hiding out there.
Get a grip. Pass it forward, not sideways.
The gaffer needs to have words. That's not good enough.
fulltime_win: Job done. Nothing more to say.
Proper performance. They wanted it more.
fulltime_loss: Not good enough. Simple as that.
Some of them should be looking at themselves.
The fans deserve better than that.

kickoff: Interesting setup today — let's see how they line up.
The shape will be key. Can they keep it compact?
Watch the transition play — that's where this will be won.
goal: Great build-up. Worked the overload perfectly.
That's been coming. The press finally told.
Quality finish — but look at the run that created it.
miss: Should've hit the target. Got his technique wrong.
That's the wrong option — pass was on.
Got caught under it. Textbook stuff, that.
halftime: The shape's all over the place. Needs sorting.
They're getting overrun in midfield. Change it.
Defensive line's too high. They'll get done.
fulltime_win: Professional performance. Did the basics right.
Tactical discipline won that. Simple as.
Good shape, good pressing. That's how you do it.
fulltime_loss: The setup was wrong from the start.
Couldn't adapt. That's on the gaffer.

kickoff: Oh I'm buzzing for this one! Should be a cracker!
What a atmosphere! The fans are up for it!
Love this fixture — always produces something special!
goal: WOW! What a hit! Absolute scenes!
Oh that is BEAUTIFUL! Take a bow, son!
YES! That's why we love football! Magnificent!
miss: Oh no! How's he missed that?!
He'll be fuming with that — should've buried it!
halftime: This is brilliant — neither side's sitting back!
More of the same, please! What a game!
fulltime_win: What a performance! They were electric today!
The fans will be talking about that for weeks!
fulltime_loss: Ah, gutting. They gave it everything though.
No shame in that — just wasn't their day.
Heads up — they'll bounce back from that.

kickoff: Let's see how they set up. The first 10 minutes will tell us.
Interesting selection. The gaffer's gone for it.
Watch the full-backs — that's where the space is.
goal: That's a coach's goal. Worked on the training ground.
Great movement. The rotation dragged the defender out.
miss: Got his body shape wrong. Should've hit the target.
That's a poor touch. Took it too wide.
Wrong decision — pass was the better option.
halftime: The structure's good. Just need more quality in the final third.
Defensive shape is sound. They're just not creating enough.
The gaffer will want more intensity in the second half.
fulltime_win: Professional. Did what they needed to do.
Solid performance. The basics were right.
Good three points. Onto the next one.
fulltime_loss: Not good enough. The basics weren't there.
They'll be disappointed with that. Too many mistakes.
The gaffer needs to look at himself too.

kickoff: Welcome back. Should be an interesting one today.
Let's see if they can put on a show for us.
The stage is set. Let's hope for goals.
goal: Oh that's lovely. Couldn't have hit it sweeter.
Goal of the season contender? Maybe.
That's why we watch the game. Beautiful.
miss: Oh dear. He'll not want to see that again.
The keeper would've been worried — until it flew wide.
halftime: A half of two halves, as they say.
Plenty to chew on at the break.
The gaffer's got some thinking to do.
fulltime_win: Three points and a clean sheet. Can't ask for more.
Job done. They'll sleep well tonight.
A professional performance. Onto the next.
fulltime_loss: One to forget. They'll want to put it behind them.
Not their day. The breaks didn't go their way.

kickoff: Let's see who fancies it today. Someone has to.
I want to see players taking responsibility. Not hiding.
The first 20 minutes will tell me everything.
goal: About time. Should've been more proactive earlier.
Took his chance. That's what strikers are paid for.
miss: Poor. Simple as that. Should've scored.
That's not good enough at this level.
He's forgotten how to finish, apparently.
halftime: Too many players hiding out there. Stand up and be counted.
The gaffer should be fuming. I would be.
fulltime_win: Won. Didn't impress. There's a difference.
Three points. They won't care how.
fulltime_loss: Shambolic. No other word for it.
Some of those players shouldn't be playing at this level.
The board will be asking questions. Rightly so.
